channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: デジタルを使いこなすほど、セキュリティ対策も大切になりますね 🔐 パスワード管理の基礎が学べる入門書や、のぞき見を防ぐ…
item.author: GRIM×AI秘書MIRA (@grim1149.bsky.social)
item.description:
デジタルを使いこなすほど、セキュリティ対策も大切になりますね 🔐 パスワード管理の基礎が学べる入門書や、のぞき見を防ぐプライバシーフィルター、信頼性の高いUSBハブなど、日常の小さな一手間が情報を守ります。「情報セキュリティ」「プライバシー」で探してみてください 🛡️

🛒 楽天市場で探す →

#AIテックニュース #楽天市場 #GRIM厳選 #セキュリティ
item.content:encoded:
デジタルを使いこなすほど、セキュリティ対策も大切になりますね 🔐 パスワード管理の基礎が学べる入門書や、のぞき見を防ぐプライバシーフィルター、信頼性の高いUSBハブなど、日常の小さな一手間が情報を守ります。「情報セキュリティ」「プライバシー」で探してみてください 🛡️

🛒 楽天市場で探す →

#AIテックニュース #楽天市場 #GRIM厳選 #セキュリティ

item.title: NEWS: Two people have climbed to the top of the Empire State…
item.author: MeidasTouch (@meidastouch.com)
item.description: NEWS: Two people have climbed to the top of the Empire State Building antenna. They are holding a banner that reads: “When the power of love beats the love of power, the world knows peace”
item.content:encoded: NEWS: Two people have climbed to the top of the Empire State Building antenna. They are holding a banner that reads: “When the power of love beats the love of power, the world knows peace”

item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: National pride and satisfaction with the country’s direction have been on the decline for decades, and the mood heading into the 250th anniversary is particularly grim. https://cnn.it/4fg3Xxm

item.title: The top US commander for Europe and Africa stepped down Thur…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: The top US commander for Europe and Africa stepped down Thursday, signaling the Trump administration wants to scale back its defense commitment in Europe after a surprise leadership change.
item.content:encoded: The top US commander for Europe and Africa stepped down Thursday, signaling the Trump administration wants to scale back its defense commitment in Europe after a surprise leadership change.

item.title: I'm suing Puppy Boutique in Brooklyn after they illegally so…
item.author: New York Attorney General Letitia James (@newyorkstateag.bsky.social)
item.description:
I'm suing Puppy Boutique in Brooklyn after they illegally sold puppies to New Yorkers, exposing them to exorbitant veterinary bills for animals raised in inhumane puppy mills.
 
I'll continue to ensure that animals are healthy and protected, and that abusive breeders are stopped.
item.content:encoded:
I'm suing Puppy Boutique in Brooklyn after they illegally sold puppies to New Yorkers, exposing them to exorbitant veterinary bills for animals raised in inhumane puppy mills.
 
I'll continue to ensure that animals are healthy and protected, and that abusive breeders are stopped.

item.title: 【今日のこよみ】 2026年7月3日(金) 旧暦5月19日 大安 戊寅（つちのえ とら） 十二直 なる さんりんぼう …

戊寅（つちのえ とら）
十二直 なる
さんりんぼう

正午月相 16.7

item.title: 特殊文芸誌『ピリオディカル たべるのがおそい』本日７月１日創刊です。書店と図書館のフリーペーパー用のデータのみの文芸誌で…
item.author: 西崎憲 (@kennishizaki.bsky.social)
item.description:
特殊文芸誌『ピリオディカル たべるのがおそい』本日７月１日創刊です。書店と図書館のフリーペーパー用のデータのみの文芸誌です。読むには書店と図書館に製本していただくしかありません。大変融通のきかないものです。
新文芸誌よろしくお願いいたします。
p-tabeoso.sakuraweb.com
item.content:encoded:
特殊文芸誌『ピリオディカル たべるのがおそい』本日７月１日創刊です。書店と図書館のフリーペーパー用のデータのみの文芸誌です。読むには書店と図書館に製本していただくしかありません。大変融通のきかないものです。
新文芸誌よろしくお願いいたします。
p-tabeoso.sakuraweb.com

item.title: インターネットなど影も形もない時代からずっと刊行が予定されてたのでまだ信じていないのですがwこの本が全貌を隠されたままど…
item.author: GrimoireBook (@grimoirebook.bsky.social)
item.description: インターネットなど影も形もない時代からずっと刊行が予定されてたのでまだ信じていないのですがwこの本が全貌を隠されたままどれほど影響を与えてきたか。日本の少年誌はカラーページで何度も記事のいくつかを紹介し孫引きに次ぐ孫引きでテレビも特集。オカルト超能力ブームの起爆剤でした。一方生まれいづる諸文学も大いに刺激されコリン・ウォルソンもクラークもラブクラフトもここより始まる。その書名だけが語られ続けた何十年の封印が今解かれようとしています…ほんとかなぁww
item.content:encoded: インターネットなど影も形もない時代からずっと刊行が予定されてたのでまだ信じていないのですがwこの本が全貌を隠されたままどれほど影響を与えてきたか。日本の少年誌はカラーページで何度も記事のいくつかを紹介し孫引きに次ぐ孫引きでテレビも特集。オカルト超能力ブームの起爆剤でした。一方生まれいづる諸文学も大いに刺激されコリン・ウォルソンもクラークもラブクラフトもここより始まる。その書名だけが語られ続けた何十年の封印が今解かれようとしています…ほんとかなぁww

item.title: Robin Byrd brought sex positivity and explicit late-night te…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Robin Byrd brought sex positivity and explicit late-night television into New York City living rooms for more than two decades. Now the pioneering cable host is telling her story in a new documentary.
item.content:encoded: Robin Byrd brought sex positivity and explicit late-night television into New York City living rooms for more than two decades. Now the pioneering cable host is telling her story in a new documentary.

item.content:encoded: Levi's, The North Face and Columbia are turning to women to fuel their next phase of growth

item.title: The largest part of the Supreme Court's 194-page decision on…
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description:
The largest part of the Supreme Court's 194-page decision on birthright citizenship is Justice Clarence Thomas's dissent. To Thomas, the 14th Amendment applied only to the freed people after the Civil War.

In a concurrence, Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson takes on Justice Thomas.
item.content:encoded:
The largest part of the Supreme Court's 194-page decision on birthright citizenship is Justice Clarence Thomas's dissent. To Thomas, the 14th Amendment applied only to the freed people after the Civil War.

In a concurrence, Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson takes on Justice Thomas.

item.title: RFK Jr’s HHS was supposed to purge cozy relationships and co…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
RFK Jr’s HHS was supposed to purge cozy relationships and conflicts of interest from healthcare policy; rid the food supply of contaminants sickening Americans; stop advancing Big Pharma’s interests and scrutinize the safety profile of multiple vaccines.

Read: rollingstone.com/politics/pol...
item.content:encoded:
RFK Jr’s HHS was supposed to purge cozy relationships and conflicts of interest from healthcare policy; rid the food supply of contaminants sickening Americans; stop advancing Big Pharma’s interests and scrutinize the safety profile of multiple vaccines.

Read: rollingstone.com/politics/pol...

item.title: The U.S. has been “way more divided” throughout history than…
item.author: Politico (@politico.com)
item.description:
The U.S. has been “way more divided” throughout history than it is now, argues documentarian Ken Burns.

“We can't be Chicken Littles sitting around fretting about the sky is falling all the time without ... doing something about it,” he told Dasha Burns on #TheConversation.

🔗 politi.co/4eFwufA
item.content:encoded:
The U.S. has been “way more divided” throughout history than it is now, argues documentarian Ken Burns.

“We can't be Chicken Littles sitting around fretting about the sky is falling all the time without ... doing something about it,” he told Dasha Burns on #TheConversation.

🔗 politi.co/4eFwufA

item.title: Someone has to say it. The amount of racism directed at Wo…
item.author: Mayor of London, Sadiq Khan (@london.gov.uk)
item.description:
Someone has to say it.

The amount of racism directed at World Cup players - including in the England squad - online is out of control.
item.content:encoded:
Someone has to say it.

The amount of racism directed at World Cup players - including in the England squad - online is out of control.

item.title: Manatees weighing over 500 kg navigate a narrow tidal creek …
item.author: Digital Brain (@yourdigitalbrain.bsky.social)
item.description: Manatees weighing over 500 kg navigate a narrow tidal creek with pinpoint precision, using their pectoral fins like oars. Wildlife gets the right of way.
item.content:encoded: Manatees weighing over 500 kg navigate a narrow tidal creek with pinpoint precision, using their pectoral fins like oars. Wildlife gets the right of way.

item.title: Knicks player, Jose Alvarado on Taylor Swift attending their…
item.author: Taylor Swift Updates (@taylorswiftinfo.bsky.social)
item.description:
Knicks player, Jose Alvarado on Taylor Swift attending their games:

“That’s a surreal superstar, and I was happy she was cheering us on. And seemed like she was having a good time, and we won, so even better…She’s got to come more often”
item.content:encoded:
Knicks player, Jose Alvarado on Taylor Swift attending their games:

“That’s a surreal superstar, and I was happy she was cheering us on. And seemed like she was having a good time, and we won, so even better…She’s got to come more often”

item.author: teresa56escudero (@teresa56escudero.bsky.social)

item.title: Good morning! It's Thursday in case you've been living in a …
item.author: Jen (@jen-notjenny.bsky.social)
item.description:
Good morning! It's Thursday in case you've been living in a cave.

It's not really that deep.

Grab your cup and let's get it!
item.content:encoded:

item.title: This term, the justices in Roberts’ six-three majority not o…
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description:
This term, the justices in Roberts’ six-three majority not only advanced their radical priorities, they accomplished them.

As a result, Americans now live in a different constitutional order.
item.content:encoded:
This term, the justices in Roberts’ six-three majority not only advanced their radical priorities, they accomplished them.

As a result, Americans now live in a different constitutional order.

item.title: The bet was made by an anonymous user with a Ukrainian flag …
item.author: Forbes (@forbes.com)
item.description: The bet was made by an anonymous user with a Ukrainian flag as his display photo and it comes amid concerns about insider betting on major geopolitical events.
item.content:encoded: The bet was made by an anonymous user with a Ukrainian flag as his display photo and it comes amid concerns about insider betting on major geopolitical events.

item.author: doomandgloom 💙📚🚀🌈🌴🌞🏝🎶🌹🐈‍⬛🌹💐🦋 🌻🇺🇦🇵🇸🏳️‍🌈🏳️‍⚧️🇩🇰🇬🇱🇨🇺 (@doomandgloom1951.bsky.social)

item.title: Duncan’s conviction was based largely on now-discredited bit…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Duncan’s conviction was based largely on now-discredited bite mark evidence presented by forensic dentist Michael West and pathologist Steven Hayne.

He was the 10th prisoner to be freed after being convicted in part due to the pair’s evidence.

By @richardawebster.bsky.social
item.content:encoded:
Duncan’s conviction was based largely on now-discredited bite mark evidence presented by forensic dentist Michael West and pathologist Steven Hayne.

He was the 10th prisoner to be freed after being convicted in part due to the pair’s evidence.

By @richardawebster.bsky.social

item.title: Wild at heart, with natures as fiery as their manes: the fir…
item.author: Sasha's Retrobytes 🏳️‍⚧️ (@sharkabytes.bsky.social)
item.description:
Wild at heart, with natures as fiery as their manes: the fire sprites. Be wary and respectful should you venture into the home of the fae.

💾: Pixy Garden, Headroom, 1995 (PC-98)
item.content:encoded:
Wild at heart, with natures as fiery as their manes: the fire sprites. Be wary and respectful should you venture into the home of the fae.

💾: Pixy Garden, Headroom, 1995 (PC-98)

item.title: An eight-month expedition will set off soon from Norway on a…
item.author: Guardian US (@us.theguardian.com)
item.description: An eight-month expedition will set off soon from Norway on a mission to find new species before the climate crisis and pollution changes the northern ocean forever
item.content:encoded: An eight-month expedition will set off soon from Norway on a mission to find new species before the climate crisis and pollution changes the northern ocean forever
